description: AWS 인프라 헬스 (CloudWatch · ap-northeast-1). EKS 컨트롤플레인 · ECS 3 서비스 · RDS · Redis · Lambda 7 · Kinesis · ALB · CodePipeline · CloudTrail. 노드/Pod 단위는 Row 4·Row 8(Prometheus).

panels.description: apiserver_request_total rate (Prometheus kubernetes-apiservers 잡). AWS/EKS CloudWatch 미발행 — 컨트롤플레인 /metrics 스크레이프.
panels.title: EKS · API server 요청률

panels.description: apiserver_request_total code 별 rate (Prometheus) — 컨트롤플레인 이상.
panels.title: EKS · API server 에러 (4XX/5XX/429)

panels.description: Ready 상태 노드 수 (Prometheus kubernetes-nodes 잡 up 합). Pod 미스케줄/단위 헬스는 Row 4·8 — kube-state-metrics 미설치.
panels.title: EKS · 노드 Ready

panels.description: AWS/ElastiCache Evictions — bookflow-redis. >0 이면 메모리 압박.
panels.title: Redis · Evictions

panels.description: AWS/Kinesis GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds — 소비자 지연. 값이 크면 Glue/소비 Lambda 가 따라가지 못함.
panels.title: Kinesis · Iterator Age (소비 지연)

panels.description: AWS/ApplicationELB RequestCount — bookflow-alb-external. Internal ALB 는 ingress-nginx NLB → Row 4(Prometheus).
panels.title: ALB · 요청 수 (External)

panels.description: AWS/ApplicationELB HealthyHostCount — bookflow-alb-external · TargetGroup bookflow-inventory-api-tg. target 메트릭은 LoadBalancer+TargetGroup 2개 차원 필요.
panels.title: ALB · Healthy Target

panels.description: cp-eks·cp-ecs·publisher-bg. CodePipeline 은 CW 메트릭 네이티브 미발행 → EventBridge 커스텀 메트릭 필요. 데일리 자원·현재 미배포.
panels.title: CodePipeline · 최근 실행 결과

panels.description: CloudWatch Logs (/aws/cloudtrail/bookflow). 5분 bin API 호출 수. 트레일→CWLogs 연동 시 동작 · 현재 트레일 미생성.

targets.expression: fields @timestamp | stats count(*) as 호출수 by bin(5m)

panels.title: CloudTrail · API 활동량

panels.description: CloudWatch Logs (/aws/cloudtrail/bookflow). Create*/Update*/Delete*/Put*/Modify* 이벤트 — 누가 무엇을 변경했나.

targets.expression: fields @timestamp, eventName, eventSource, userIdentity.arn as actor | filter eventName like /^(Create|Update|Delete|Put|Modify|Run|Terminate)/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 50

panels.title: CloudTrail · 리소스 변경 이력

panels.description: CloudWatch Logs (/aws/cloudtrail/bookflow). errorCode 존재 이벤트 (AccessDenied·UnauthorizedOperation 등) — 보안·감사.

targets.expression: fields @timestamp, errorCode, eventName, eventSource, userIdentity.arn as actor, sourceIPAddress | filter ispresent(errorCode) | sort @timestamp desc | limit 50

panels.title: CloudTrail · 실패 / 비정상 API 호출

title: BookFlow 운영 — AWS 인프라
